description: A court document which details that Sitt al-Dar, wife of Sedaqa ha-Levi, promised to comply with the stipulation of her late brother, Sedaqa, to provide for their mother until her death and arrange a proper funeral for her upon her death. In addition, she promised to pay her brother Hiba Bu-Saʿid ten dinars if he appeared in the country. Her husband confirmed this promise and acted as a financial co-signer. (Information from Goitein’s index card)
